payload.plan:
## Research Agenda: Integrated UAV-based Structural Inspection and Crowd Monitoring

This agenda was assembled from selected papers, retrieved evidence, and deterministic fallback heuristics.

### Seed Directions
- Prototype a privacy-preserving integrated uav-based structural inspection and crowd monitoring study that uses UAV-based Crowd Surveillance in Post COVID-19 Era as the baseline signal source. (UAV-based Crowd Surveillance in Post COVID-19 Era)
- Prototype a privacy-preserving integrated uav-based structural inspection and crowd monitoring study that uses ViewBirdiformer: Learning to recover ground-plane crowd trajectories and
  ego-motion from a single ego-centric view as the baseline signal source. (ViewBirdiformer: Learning to recover ground-plane crowd trajectories and
  ego-motion from a single ego-centric view)
- Prototype a privacy-preserving integrated uav-based structural inspection and crowd monitoring study that uses UAV-CROWD: Violent and non-violent crowd activity simulator from the
  perspective of UAV as the baseline signal source. (UAV-CROWD: Violent and non-violent crowd activity simulator from the
  perspective of UAV)

### Cross-Paper Directions
- Compare UAV-based Crowd Surveillance in Post COVID-19 Era against ViewBirdiformer: Learning to recover ground-plane crowd trajectories and
  ego-motion from a single ego-centric view in a shared privacy-preserving ocular-classification benchmark.
- Compare UAV-based Crowd Surveillance in Post COVID-19 Era against UAV-CROWD: Violent and non-violent crowd activity simulator from the
  perspective of UAV in a shared privacy-preserving ocular-classification benchmark.
- Compare ViewBirdiformer: Learning to recover ground-plane crowd trajectories and
  ego-motion from a single ego-centric view against UAV-based Crowd Surveillance in Post COVID-19 Era in a shared privacy-preserving ocular-classification benchmark.
- Compare ViewBirdiformer: Learning to recover ground-plane crowd trajectories and
  ego-motion from a single ego-centric view against UAV-CROWD: Violent and non-violent crowd activity simulator from the
  perspective of UAV in a shared privacy-preserving ocular-classification benchmark.

### Next Step
Run a small benchmark that measures task utility, demographic leakage, and robustness across sensors.
